content:
♫ ☆•° * Your nightmares are our dreams, the night is our stage, and we'll make the show ⋆｡°✩ ♫

Realm Mastery: 60
Black Sigil Drop: 14%

Strike: Deal 14 dmg. Quasar: Next card you'll play apply weakness to enemy equal to it's cost x10
Shield: Shield 20. Quasar: Next card you'll play gain +8 Realm Mastery

"Under the bed" 1 cost: Draw a card, reduce the drawn card cost by 2. Quasar: Gain 1 arithmetica.
"Behind curtains" 3 cost: Annihilate 2 cards, deal damage to all enemies equal to their total cost x200.
"Frightening stare" 0 cost: After playing "Frightening stare" ,the next card you play will trigger Quasar effect even if it's not the first card you play.

Rouse 2 cost: "Break a leg" Gain 50 aliemus. Each turn, place  "Frightening stare" in your hand. Each time Pierot plays first, you gain another "Frightening stare".

E1: Gain 10 realm mastery each time you annihilate a card.
E2: For each realm mastery point, gain 0,1% Aliemus Regen.
E3: "Frightening stare" now apply 5% corrosion and gain retain.

Exalt: "Dream Theater" Put 2 cards in your hand in ultra space. If it's an ultra turn, reduce the cost of two cards in your hand by 2. Apply weakness to enemies.

OverExalt: "The Never Ending Show" Put 2 cards of the draw pile in ultra space, draw 2 cards . If it's an ultra turn, reduce the cost of all your cards in hand by 2. Apply weakness to enemies. Gain 1 ultra space slot. Increase realm mastery by 10% until the end of the mission.
